_comment: Per-stock earnings (results) blackout dates for G8. The earnings-blackout gate suppresses signals on STOCK_BASES within [date-DAYS_BEFORE, date+DAYS_AFTER] of a results date. Index bases are never blacked out. Keys are bases (upper-case, as in STOCK_BASES); values are IST results dates. UNVERIFIED until populated from an authoritative NSE results calendar — set verified=true once populated. Refresh each quarter (Q1 Jul, Q2 Oct, Q3 Jan, Q4 Apr). Point INDIA_EARNINGS_EVENTS_FILE at a live source to replace this file.
_source: NSE corporate results calendar (populate per quarter)
